notes: Accepted CC7.5.5 comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged.
UI polish: own comment no longer renders fallback avatar/initial letter near the bubble.
Client send guard: while a comment is being sent, send button is disabled, input is read-only and duplicate rapid sends are ignored.
Server duplicate guard: same user/commentKey/text/attachments within 8 seconds returns the existing comment instead of creating a duplicate.
public/app.js remains the stable entrypoint and loads app-onepass.js with v=756.
No server override for public/app.js, no overlay, no floating hints, no external code.run /app comments button.
